– Hit target must save vs. Death or suffer 2 points of poison damage per second for 10 seconds

Damage: 1d4 (missile)
Speed Factor: 2
Proficiency Type: Dagger
Type: One-handed
Requires:
 3 Strength

Weight: 0《標準的投擲匕首通常都是雙面開鋒、有著尖端的刀子，和只有單鋒的小刀不同，後者要比匕首短一點。和匕首不同的是，這把匕首的把手比較小，重量平衡不同。每一把毒匕首的刀鋒上都淬了薄薄一層毒液，在受過訓練的刺客手中是一把致命的武器。

資料資料：

戰鬥能力：
-被擊中的目標必須通過對死亡的豁免檢定，否則每秒受到2點毒素傷害，持續10秒

傷害：1d4（遠程）
使用速度：2
武器特長類別：匕首
使用類別：單手
需求：
力量3

重量：1》~

(Necromancy)

Level: 5
Sphere: Necromantic
Range: 30 ft.
Duration: Permanent 
Casting Time: 9 
Area of Effect: 1 creature 
Saving Throw: Special 

This spell is only available to Harpers. Harper's Call restores a comrade to life to further service the cause of the Harpers. This spell functions similarly to Raise Dead, with the following exceptions: The Harper must transfer a small portion of her life essence (10 Hit Points) to successfully raise the deceased person; the person has but 1 Hit Point when raised and must regain the rest by natural healing or curative magic; and the raised person suffers a -5 penalty to all ability scores except Constitution for one minute, making this spell virtually useless in combat. This spell will never reduce the recipient's ability scores below 1.《豎琴手之召喚（死靈系）
等級：5
領域：死靈
有效距離：施法者視線所及
持續時間：永久
施法時間：1輪
影響範圍：1人
豁免檢定：特殊

只有豎琴手才可以使用這個法術。豎琴手之召喚可以讓陣亡的戰友起死回生，繼續為豎琴手的目標而努力。它的作用與「死者復活」法術類似，不過有下列幾點不同。首先，豎琴手必須犧牲一小部分維繫生命的元素（10點生命骰數）才能喚起已故的人物。而且，剛復活的生物只有1點生命值，必須要靠自然方法或治療魔法來恢復其生命值。最後，剛復活人物的各項能力屬令在一分鐘內都會-5，所以此法術在戰場上等於一點用都沒有。》~

@44943  = ~Iron Skins
(Alteration)

Sphere: Elemental
Level: 5
Range: 0
Duration: 12 hours
Casting Time: 9
Area of Effect: The caster
Saving Throw: None 

When a Druid casts this powerful spell upon <PRO_HIMHER>self, an outer skin of iron will move up from the ground, completely covering <PRO_HIMHER>. This skin is, of course, magical and will hinder the Druid in no way. The effect of this is to protect the Druid from physical attacks such as melee weapons and projectiles. For every 2 levels of the caster, an additional skin is gained upon casting. For example, a 10th-level Druid would receive 5 skins. For each skin the Druid possesses, the spell will stop one attack, so a 10th-level Druid would be protected from the first 5 attacks made against <PRO_HIMHER> but the 6th would affect <PRO_HIMHER> normally. The skins will remain on the Druid until <PRO_HESHE> is affected by a Dispel Magic, all of the skins are removed due to physical attacks, or the spell's duration expires. It is important to note that this will not protect the Druid from any area attacks such as Fireball; however, it will protect <PRO_HIMHER> from physical magical attacks such as Magic Missile.《鐵皮術
（變化系）

領域：元素
等級：5
有效距離：0
持續時間：12小時
施法時間：1
影響範圍：施法者
豁免檢定：無

當德魯伊對自己施行此法術時，一套外層防護鐵皮會由地面升起，完全裹覆其軀體。當然，這層鐵皮並不會影響德魯伊的施法或行動。此法術的效果在於為德魯伊抵擋近身武器和射擊武器的攻擊。施法者每高兩個等級，就會多得一層鐵皮。例如，10級的德魯伊就會獲得5層鐵皮。每一層鐵皮可為德魯伊抵擋下一次的攻擊，若是10級的德魯伊，則可以有5次免於受到攻擊的機會，但在第六次就無法避掉。鐵皮會一直留在德魯伊身上，直到受到解除魔法影響、所有鐵皮都因為受攻擊而脫落或是法術有效期限已過為止。值得注意的是，此法術並無法抵擋區域性攻擊（例如火球術），但可以防護德魯伊免受物理性傷害魔法（如魔法飛彈術）的攻擊。》~

@45007  = ~Pixie Dust
(Illusion/Phantasm)

Level: 5
Sphere: Combat
Range: 0
Duration: Special
Casting Time: 9
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: None

This spell creates a small handful of pixie dust that the caster can use to toss into the air. Any ally hit by the dust becomes invisible (the range of the dust is about 15 ft.). Of course, the invisible creature is not magically silenced, and certain other conditions can render the creature detectable. Even allies cannot see the invisible creature or its gear, unless these allies can normally see invisible things or employ magic to do so. Items dropped or put down by the invisible creature become visible; items picked up disappear if tucked into the clothing or pouches worn by the creature.

The spell remains in effect until it is magically broken or dispelled, until the caster or recipient cancels it, until the recipient attacks any creature, or until 24 hours have passed. Thus, the invisible being can walk around and cast defensive spells; however, if <PRO_HESHE> attacks, <PRO_HESHE> immediately becomes visible, although the invisibility enables <PRO_HIMHER> to attack first.《小妖精粉（幻術/魅影系）
等級：5
有效距離：0
持續時間：特殊
施法時間：1輪
影響範圍：30尺方圓
豁免檢定：無

施行此法術可製造出一把小妖精粉，讓施法者用來灑向空中。碰觸到粉末者將會變成隱形狀態（小妖精粉的擴散範圍約為30尺方圓）。當然，隱形生物並沒有被消音，任何這類的蛛絲馬跡還是會讓它露出馬腳。隱形生物的同夥，除非是平常就看得見隱形物、或是擁有此種法力，否則也是看不見人或是其使用的交通工具。若隱形生物將攜帶的物品放下或卸下，此物即不再隱形；相反的，若是將物品塞近衣服或口袋內，此物也會變為隱形的。此法術效果會在遭破解或解除、法師或受術者取消此法術或24小時後失效。儘管隱形狀態能協助受術者掌握第一攻擊時機，不過一旦採取攻擊，就會立刻現形。》~

@45045  = ~Summon Insects《召喚昆蟲》~
@45046  = ~~
@45047  = ~Summon Insects 
(Conjuration/Summoning)

Level: 3
Sphere: Animal
Range: 90 ft.
Duration: 7 rounds
Casting Time: 9
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: Neg.

The Summon Insects spell attracts a cloud or swarm of normal insects to attack one enemy of the caster. This swarm gathers at a point chosen by the caster within the spell's range and attacks any single creature the caster points to. The victim may make a Saving Throw vs. Breath Weapon with a -4 penalty to escape the swarm; otherwise, the victim receives 1 point of damage every 2 seconds for the duration of the spell. Moreover, the victim fights with a -2 penalty to <PRO_HISHER> attack roll and a -2 penalty to <PRO_HISHER> Armor Class. The swarm will repeatedly bite the target, making it very difficult to cast spells (50% chance of spell failure).《召喚昆蟲（咒法/召喚系）
領域：動物
有效距離：30碼
持續時間：7輪
施法時間：9
影響範圍：一個生物
豁免檢定：特殊

召喚昆蟲法術可以吸引一群一般昆蟲群起攻擊施法者的某個敵人。它們群聚的地點由施法師決定，並在法術的範圍內攻擊施法者指向的單一生物。
受術者必須以-4的不利修正進行對噴吐攻擊的豁免檢定，才能躲過蟲群。否則，受術者將在法術作用期間內每兩秒遭受到1點的傷害。
展開反擊的受術者攻擊檢定將有-2的不利，而防禦等級則受到+2的不利修正。蟲群將不斷攻擊目標，造成其施法上的極大困擾（有50%的法術失敗率）。》~
@45048  = ~This is a representation of Torm, the god of loyalty and obedience.《這是托姆的象徵，就是忠誠和服從之神。》~

@45050  = ~Insect Plague《疫病蟲群》~
@45051  = ~Insect Plague 
(Conjuration/Summoning)

Sphere: Combat
Level: 5
Range: 360 ft.
Duration: 6 rounds
Casting Time: 5
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

When this spell is cast by the priest, a horde of creeping, hopping, and flying insects gather and swarm. This swarm will jump first to the enemy target, then to the nearest allies of the target's, until up to 6 creatures have been affected. Spellcasting within the swarm is impossible (100% chance of spell failure). Creatures in the insect plague sustain 1 point of damage every 2 seconds they remain within regardless of their Armor Class, due to the bites and stings of the insects. Invisibility is no protection. Due to the suffocating nature of the writhing insect swarm, each victim must make a Saving Throw vs. Breath Weapon or run away in fear for 1 round.《疫病蟲群（咒法/召喚系）
領域：戰鬥
等級：5
有效距離：120碼
持續時間：6輪
施法時間：5
影響範圍：視線範圍內的敵人
豁免檢定：特殊

當牧師施行此法術時，無論爬行、跳躍以及會飛的昆蟲都會群聚在一起。這群蟲子會先跳到目標身上，然後擴散到離目標最近的盟友，直到波及六個敵人為止。想要在這群蟲子間施法是絕無可能的（法術失敗率100%），在昆蟲疫區內的所有生物無論防禦等級高低，都會因為昆蟲的叮咬而每兩秒招致1點的傷害。隱形術在此派不上用場。由於蟲群的纏繞十分擾人，因此每個受術者都必須進行對噴吐攻擊的豁免檢定，否則將因恐慌而逃離1輪。》~
@45052  = ~~
@45053  = ~~
@45054  = ~Earthquake《地震術》~
@45055  = ~Earthquake
(Alteration)

Level: 7
Sphere: Elemental (Earth)
Range: 360 ft.
Duration: 3 tremors
Casting Time: 9
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

When this spell is cast, a local tremor of fairly high strength rips the ground. The shock is over in several rounds. The earthquake affects all creatures in its area of effect. There are 3 tremors that are caused by the earthquake: 

 1st: All creatures affected take 6d6 points of damage and fall to the ground for 4 rounds. A successful Saving Throw vs. Spell with a -6 penalty halves the damage and negates the fall.
 2nd: All creatures affected take 3d6 points of damage. A successful Saving Throw vs. Spell with a -2 penalty halves the damage.
 3rd: All creatures affected take 2d6 points of damage. A successful Saving Throw vs. Spell halves the damage.

This spell will affect both enemies and friends of the caster's, so care must be taken in its use. Finally, earth elementals dislike mere mortals toying with the land and there is a small chance that casting this spell will cause an earth elemental to appear and attack the party.《地震術（變化系）

領域：元素（土）
等級：7
有效距離：120碼
持續時間：3次地震
施法時間：1輪
影響範圍：40呎半徑
豁免檢定：特殊

當牧師施行此法術時，將會引發一場區域性的巨大震動，劇烈晃動指定區域內的地面。這樣的震力將持續數輪，在影響範圍內的生物都會受到波及。
地震術造成的震動共有三波。第一波的地震將使得所有受影響的生物遭受6d6點的傷害（以-6不利通過對法術的豁免檢定可使傷害減半）。未通過檢定者將有4輪倒地不起，武器亦會落下。
第二次的震動比較沒有那麼劇烈，僅造成3d6點的傷害（以不利通過對法術的豁免檢定可使傷害減半）。未通過檢定者也將丟下武器。最後的一波地震動會造成2d6點的傷害（通過對法術的豁免檢定即可使傷害減半）。若未通過豁免檢定檢定，受術者同樣會拋下武器。
由於此法術的影響範圍不分敵我，因此使用上必須特別小心。還有，土元素可不喜歡這種凡人戲弄土地的計倆，因此施行此法將有些許機率喚起土元素，此元素將攻擊施法者的隊伍。》~

@45058  = ~Symbol, Death
(Conjuration/Summoning)

Level: 7
Sphere: Guardian
Range: 90 ft.
Duration: Special
Casting Time: 9
Area of Effect: 12-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Neg.

Symbol, Death is a powerful enchantment that allows the priest to inscribe a symbol on the ground or any other surface. The symbol will remain there until someone comes too close, at which point it will explode, causing all those within the area of effect to make a Saving Throw vs. Death or die. Creatures with more than 60 current Hit Points are immune to this effect.《死亡法印（咒法/召喚系）
領域：守護
等級：7
有效距離：30碼
持續時間：特殊
施法時間：1輪
影響範圍：30尺方圓
豁免檢定：通過則無效

死亡法印是一種強大的法術，借由這個法術，牧師可以在地上或其他任何平面畫出一個法術印記，而且在有人接近之前會一直留在原處。若有任何生物太過接近，法印便被啟動，並發生爆裂。範圍內的所有生物必須做對死亡的豁免檢定。生命點數現值大於60點的生物不受此法術影響。》~

@45821  = ~Dispel Magic
(Abjuration)

Level: 3
Range: 40 ft.
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 5
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: None

A Dispel Magic spell removes magical effects upon anyone within the area. This includes effects given from spells, potions and certain magical items such as wands. It does not, however, affect enchanted magical items or spell protections such as Spell Turning and Spell Deflection. The chance of the dispel succeeding is determined by the level of the caster and the level of the magic being dispelled. The base chance of successfully dispelling is 50%. For every level that the caster of the Dispel Magic is above the original caster, <PRO_HISHER> chance of success increases by 5%. For every level that the caster of Dispel Magic is below the original caster, <PRO_HISHER> chance of success decreases by 10%. However, despite the difference in levels, there is always at least a 5% chance of success or failure. Thus, if a caster is 10 levels higher than the magic <PRO_HESHE> is trying to dispel, there is only a 5% chance of failure. Similarly if the caster is 4 levels lower than the magic <PRO_HESHE> is trying to dispel, there is only a 10% chance of success. Intuitively, this spell is almost useless if the target is 5 or more levels higher than the caster.

Note: While this spell dispels the individual effects of Grease, Web, Stinking Cloud, and other such spells, it does not dispel the area of effect.《解除魔法（防護系）
等級：3
有效距離：施法者視線所及
持續時間：特殊
施法時間：5
影響範圍：30尺見方
豁免檢定：特殊

解除魔法可以移除作用區域內所有對象身上的魔法效應，包括法術、藥水或是某些魔法物品的影響。不過，它並不會影響魔法物品本身的效用，或是魔法防護法術如「法術反轉」及「法術偏轉」。解除魔法是否成功取決於施法者本身的等級以及施展目標法術者的等級。基本的解除成功機率是50%。施行解除魔法者只要每高於原施法者一級，解除成功機率就會提高5%；若每低於一級，則機率降低10%。不過，無論兩者間的等級差距多少，至少都會有1%的成功或失敗機率。也就是說，當施法者的等級高於他正試圖解除的魔法有十等級，解除失敗率就只有1%；同樣的，若低於四級，解除成功機率就只有10%。這麼看來，若是欲解除的魔法等級高於施法者5級或以上，這個法術根本派不上用場。
請注意：雖然這個法術可以解除油膩術、蛛網術和臭雲術的影響，但是並不會解除法術的作用區域。》~

@45866  = ~SORCERER: Sorcerers are practitioners of magic who were born with the innate ability to cast spells. It is thought that the blood of some powerful creature flows through their veins; perhaps they are the spawn of the gods themselves, or even dragons walking in humanoid form. Regardless, the Sorcerer's magic is intuitive rather than logical. They know fewer spells than Mages, and acquire spells more slowly, but they can cast spells more often and have no need to select and prepare spells ahead of time. Sorcerers cannot specialize in magic the way Mages do. Other than these differences, a Sorcerer is very similar to a Mage.

CLASS FEATURES:

– May not wear any armor.
– May only use the following weapons: dagger, quarterstaff, dart, sling.
– May only become Proficient (one slot) in any weapon class.
– May not place any slots in any fighting style.
– May cast arcane spells.
– May not scribe spells into their spellbooks as Mages do. Instead, Sorcerers learn a small number of spells at each level, which they can cast daily without memorization.
– Hit Die: d4《術士：術士是天生的魔法師，他們與生具有施法的能力。據說他們身上留著某種強大生物的血，又有一說認為他們是神之子或是以人的形體行進的龍。不論何種說法成立，可以肯定的是，術士的法力是自然而生，沒有什麼邏輯性可言。雖然他們懂得法術不比法師多，學習施法的速度也慢的多，但卻可以經常施法，而且無須事先選擇法術或準備施法。它們無法像法師一般如此專精於某項法術，除此這些差別之外，術士和法師並沒什麼兩樣。
請注意：術士「不是」透過抄寫卷軸來習得法術，他們可以在每個等級時選擇新法術。術士最重要的屬性是「智力」。》~
@45867  = ~MONK: Monks are warriors who pursue perfection through contemplation as well as action. They are versatile fighters, especially skilled in combat without weapons or armor. Though Monks cannot cast spells, they have a unique magic of their own: They channel a subtle energy, called ki, which allows them to perform amazing feats. The Monk's best known feat is their ability to stun an opponent with an unarmed blow.

CLASS FEATURES:

– May not wear any armor.
– May only use weapons available to the Thief class (except two-handed).
– May only become Proficient (one slot) in any weapon class.
– May only become Proficient (one slot) in Single-Weapon Style and may not put slots into any other style.
– Moves 2 points faster than other characters. Movement rate further improves by 1 every 5 levels.
– May make 1 unarmed attack per round. An additional 1/2 attack per round is gained every 3 levels. Damage dealt by unarmed attacks increases with level as follows:
  Level 1-2: 1d6
  Level 3-5: 1d8
  Level 6-8: 1d10
  Level 9-14: 1d12
  Level 15+: 1d20
– At level 9, unarmed attacks are treated as a +1 magical weapon and gain a +1 bonus to hit and damage rolls. This enchantment improves to +2 at level 12, +3 at level 15, and +4 at level 25. 
– Receives a +2 bonus to Saving Throws vs. Spell.
– Deflect Missiles: +1 bonus to AC vs. missile attacks every 3 levels.
– Starts with an Armor Class of 9 at 1st level and gains an additional +1 bonus every 2 levels.
– May use the Stunning Blow ability once per day. Gains one use at level 1 and an additional use every 4 levels thereafter.

STUNNING BLOW: All successful attacks within the next round force the victim to save vs. Spell or be stunned. This special ability automatically modifies normal attacks; no targeting needs to be done.

– 5th level: Becomes immune to all diseases and cannot be slowed or hasted.
– 7th level: May use the Lay On Hands ability on <PRO_HIMHER>self to heal 2 Hit Points per level.
– 8th level: Gains a -1 bonus to Speed Factor.
– 9th level: Gains a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws and becomes immune to charm.
– 11th level: Becomes immune to poison.
– 12th level: Gains another -1 bonus to Speed Factor.
– 13th level: May use the Quivering Palm ability once per day.

QUIVERING PALM: The next successful attack forces the opponent to save vs. Spell or die. This special ability automatically modifies normal attacks; no targeting needs to be done.

– 14th level: Gains 3% Magic Resistance per level (starting with 42% at 14th level).
– 20th level: Becomes immune to non-magical weapons.
– Alignment restricted to lawful.
– Hit Die: d8《武僧：武僧是透過沉思和實際行動來追求完美境界的戰士。他們是多才多藝的戰士，尤其擅長於不穿戴盔甲的徒手格鬥。雖然武僧無法施法，但他們有專屬的特殊法力。這種無形的能量稱之為「氣」，可透過它的執行展現出驚人的絕技。武僧最廣為人知的絕招就是在空手格鬥中擊暈震懾住對手。

職業優勢：
－每輪可進行1次徒手攻擊；每提升三個經驗等級可多增加1/2次的攻擊次數。
－只要武僧的等級提升，揮拳的威力也跟著提升：
1-2級：1-6
3-5級：1-8
6-8級：1-10
9-11級：1-12
12-14級：1-12
15-17級：1-20
18級以上：1-20
－武僧天生的防禦等級會隨著其經驗等級的提升而改善。一開始的防禦等級為9，每提升2級則防禦等級降1級。
－「震眩拳」，每提升4等級可每天多使用1次震眩拳的招式。接續下來的6秒將強迫受術者進行豁免檢定，否則將遭擊昏。請注意：這個特殊技能能夠自動導正武僧的攻擊，所以並不需瞄準目標。
－武僧具備「打擊暗器」的能力。每提升3個等級，閃躲遠程武器的AC值將再獲得-1的改善。
－對魔法的豁免檢定獲得+2的改善。
－武僧一開始的移動速度+2，每5等級可再+1。
－第5級：對所有疾病免疫，行動不會被遲緩或加速。
－第7級：可使用「聖療術」，每等級可恢復2點生命。
－第8級：攻擊速度獲得-1的改善。
－第9級：所有檢定獲得+1的改善；對魅惑免疫；武僧的雙手視為+1的魔法武器（12級為+2，15級為+3）。
－第11級：對毒素免疫。
－第12級：攻擊速度再-1，徒手攻擊相當於+2的魔法武器。
－第13級：每天可使用一次「穿震掌」的絕招。這絕招能使武僧進行一次猛烈的掌擊，當擊中對手時，若對手未通過豁免檢定，則必死無疑。請注意：這個特殊技能能夠自動導正武僧的攻擊，所以並不需瞄準目標。
－第14級：每等級增加3%的魔法抗性（例如，14級時就有42%的抗性）
－第15級：揮出的重拳相當於+3的魔法武器。
－第20級：對非魔法武器免疫。

職業限制：
－武僧不能穿戴任何護甲。
－只能選用盜賊職業所使用的武器（雙手武器除外）。》~

@45889  = ~Find Familiar
(Conjuration/Summoning)

Level: 1
Range: n/a
Duration: Special
Casting Time: 9
Area of Effect: 1 familiar
Saving Throw: None

This spell enables the caster to attempt to summon a familiar to act as <PRO_HISHER> aide and companion. Familiars are typically small creatures. A creature acting as a familiar can benefit a wizard, conveying its sensory powers to its master, conversing with <PRO_HIMHER>, and serving as a guard/scout/spy as well. A wizard can have only one familiar at a time, and <PRO_HESHE> has no control over what sort of creature answers the summoning, if any come at all.

(Note: This spell may only be cast by the protagonist.)

The creature is always more intelligent than others of its type (typically by 2 or 3 Intelligence points), and its bond with the wizard confers upon it an exceptionally long life. The wizard has an empathic link with the familiar and can issue it mental commands. The caster receives half the familiar's total Hit Points (rounded down) as bonus Hit Points. However, the caster must take care to treat <PRO_HISHER> familiar well, for if the familiar should die, the caster loses the bonus Hit Points and the familiar's Hit Points again as damage. Also when a familiar dies, the caster loses 1 point of Constitution PERMANENTLY.

Example: A Mage has 12 Hit Points and casts Find Familiar. The imp summoned has 18 Hit Points, so the caster gets a bonus of 9 Hit Points. The caster now has 21 Hit Points. If the familiar dies, the caster loses those 9 Hit Points (putting <PRO_HIMHER> back at 12), loses 1 point of Constitution permanently (which may cause additional Hit Point loss), and takes 18 damage.

Here is a list of the familiars that the player receives according to alignment:

LAWFUL GOOD, NEUTRAL GOOD: Pseudo Dragon
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: -2
– Magic Resistance: 50%
– Combat: 2 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d3 damage, save vs. Death or be rendered unconscious for 2 turns
– Special Abilities: Can cast Blur once per day. Regenerates 1 HP/round. Immune to level drain, sleep, and petrification.

LAWFUL NEUTRAL: Ferret
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: 0
– Magic Resistance: 50%
– Combat: 2 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d3 damage
– Special Abilities: Has 75% in Pick Pockets, 40% in Hide in Shadows/Move Silently, and 20% in Detect Traps. Can cast Blur once per day. Immune to level drain, sleep, and petrification.

LAWFUL EVIL: Imp
– Hit Points: 18
– Armor Class: 2
– Magic Resistance: 25%
– Combat: 1 attack per round at 15 THAC0 for 1d6 damage
– Special Abilities: Has 100% resistance to fire, cold, and electricity. Can cast Polymorph Self once per day. Regenerates 1 HP/round.

NEUTRAL: Rabbit
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: 1
– Magic Resistance: 65%
– Combat: 2 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d2 damage
– Special Abilities: Has 50% in Detect Traps and 30% Hide in Shadows/Move Silently. Has 75% resistance to fire, cold, and electricity.

NEUTRAL EVIL: Dust Mephit
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: 6
– Magic Resistance: 10%
– Combat: 2 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d2 damage
– Special Abilities: Has 100% resistance to fire and 50% resistance to slashing, piercing, and missile damage. Can cast Glitterdust once per day and Glass Dust twice per day. Regenerates 1 HP/round. Immune to level drain, sleep, and petrification.

CHAOTIC GOOD: Fairy Dragon
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: 4
– Magic Resistance: 32%
– Combat: 2 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d2 damage
– Special Abilities: Can cast Mirror Image and Invisibility, 10' Radius once per day. Immune to level drain, sleep, and petrification.

CHAOTIC NEUTRAL: Cat
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: 0
– Magic Resistance: 50%
– Combat: 2 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d3 damage
– Special Abilities: Has 30% in Pick Pockets and 99% in Move Silently/Hide in Shadows. Immune to level drain, sleep, and petrification.

CHAOTIC EVIL: Quasit
– Hit Points: 24
– Armor Class: 2
– Magic Resistance: 25%
– Combat: 3 attacks per round at 13 THAC0 for 1d6 damage
– Special Abilities: Has 100% resistance to fire, cold, and electricity. Can cast Horror and Blur once per day. Regenerates 1 HP/round.《尋找魔寵（咒法/召喚系）
等級：1
有效距離：n/a
持續時間：特殊
施法時間：1輪
影響範圍：一隻魔寵
豁免檢定：特殊

此法術可讓施法者試圖找尋一名魔寵，作為他的幫手或同伴。這些魔寵一般而言都是小型生物。魔寵能為法師們帶來一些好處：分享其感官以延伸法師的感知力、與法師交談或是扮演護衛、偵查、間諜等角色。法師一次只能有一名魔寵，而且也無法控制要召喚出何種生物。（請注意：只有主角可以施展找這個法術。）
被召喚的生物往往比其同類生物更聰明（高2-3點的智力），而與法師生命上的連結也使其壽命得以延長。
法師會與這名魔寵心靈相通，因而可借由心靈傳達命令。法師亦可獲得魔寵生命值的一半，作為自己額外的生命點數。不過，施法者必須善待魔寵，否則一旦魔寵死亡，施法者將喪失增加的額外生命值，以及損失一半的魔寵生命值（等同於傷害）。而且，魔寵的死也將使施法者「永遠」失去1點的體質屬性。

舉例說明：一名擁有12點生命值的法師施行此法術。由於受召喚的小惡魔有18點生命值，因此法師獲得額外9點的生命值。如果小惡魔死亡，法師即喪失9點最高生命值（就剩原來的12點）、永久失去1點的體質（可能會因此而損失更多的最高生命值），並且再受到9點的傷害。

以下為可能獲得的魔寵名單（依陣營區分）：

守序善良、中立善良：偽龍（Pseudo Dragon）
防禦等級：-2
生命值：24
魔法抗力：50%
特殊技能：每輪可攻擊2次，攻擊的零級命中值為13，可造成1-3點傷害。被擊中的對象必須進行豁免檢定，否則將失去意識2回合。

守序中立：雪貂（Ferret）
防禦等級：0
生命值：24
魔法抗力：50%
特殊技能：有75%的扒竊能力、40%陰影躲藏/無聲行動、和20%找尋陷阱的技能。

守序邪惡：小惡魔（Imp）
防禦等級：2
生命值：18
魔法抗力：25%
特殊技能：可以施展變形自己（Polymorph self）。

絕對中立：兔子（Rabbit）
防禦等級：-4
生命值：24
魔法抗力：75%
特殊技能：有50%找尋陷阱和30%陰影躲藏/無聲行動能力。

中立邪惡：灰魔蝠（Dust Mephit）
防禦等級：6
生命值：24
魔法抗力：10%
特殊技能：每日可施展閃耀之粉2次。

混亂善良：妖精龍（Fairy Dragon）
防禦等級：4
生命值：24
魔法抗力：32%
特殊技能：可以施展鏡影術（Mirror Image）以及10尺隱形術（Invisibility 10' Radius）。

混亂中立：貓（Cat）
防禦等級：0
生命值：24
魔法抗力：50%
特殊技能：有99%陰影躲藏和無聲行動能力。

混亂邪惡：誇塞魔（Quasit）
防禦等級：2
生命值：24
魔法抗力：25%
特殊技能：可以施展恐懼術（Horror）和朦朧術（Blur）。

請注意：每種魔寵都有扒竊技能，只是熟練程度不同。》~

This item, like most drow equipment, is created using adamantine, an alloy of adamantite that quickly turns to dust if removed from the Underdark.

They thought another guild was converting them, making a bid for control of the city's underground, and directed an attack against what they thought was the guild headquarters, Irenicus's dungeon below Waukeen's.

Since I was of such interest to Irenicus, they needed to know what I was up to. Once they realized that Irenicus was a threat to us both, they sought to aid me, while also aiding themselves. @48004  = ~It seems there are always more questions than answers. Your captor, Irenicus, met your escape, though he was already in battle, bested, and taken by wizards in cowls of purple before you could do much of anything against him. Now you stand in the square of a great city, the bustle of commerce already absorbing the disturbance you witnessed. You will have to determine what happened to both your missing friend and the man that so callously used you. What was this Irenicus that it took so many to subdue him? And what could *you* do if you found him again? The uncertainty of your situation is unnerving. Hopefully, the citizens of this place will prove friendly.《看起來問題總比答案多。你的綁架者，艾瑞尼卡斯，發現你逃脫了，但是他已經陷在戰鬥之中，並且在你對付他之前，就被穿著紫色斗篷的法師帶走了。更糟的是，愛蒙也被帶走了，顯然是因為使用危險魔法的「罪行」。現在你站在一個大城的廣場上，商業的繁忙已經將你剛才看到的混亂消失得一乾二淨。你必須知道你兩位失蹤的朋友發生了什麼事，還有那個利用你的人。這個艾瑞尼卡斯是誰？為什麼有這麼多人要找他？如果你再找到他，你可以做什麼？你的狀況的不確定性令人發狂。希望這個地方的居民會友善一點。》~
@48005  = ~CHAPTER TWO

The deal is made, and you have a goal, albeit a distant one. Your new "friend" has assured you that passage to Imoen can be bought... though you are certain the final tally will include much more than gold. Any help is welcome, however, and while the cost may be steep, your path is clear. Finding Imoen will lead to Irenicus... and to answers long overdue.《第二章

交易完成了，你也有了一個目標，雖然是遙遠的目標。你的新「朋友」保證你可以買通找到愛蒙的路，但是你確定最後的代價一定不只是那筆錢而已。但是任何幫助都是好的，而且雖然價格可能高了一點，但是你的路途很明確。找到愛蒙就可以找到艾瑞尼卡斯，並且找到延拓已久的答案。》~ [CHAPT02]

@49197  = ~No doubt these texts will prove to be an embarrassing legacy, but I must order my thoughts herein lest they spill from my accursed mind.

Spellhold is in my control. Once recovered from my torpor, I made short work of what defenses there were. Coordinator Wanev conveniently removed himself, suffering a peculiar reaction to a spell of mine. I forget what it was; perhaps something I heard in the temples of Suldanessellar... does it even matter now?

My condition grows worse, and what I remember of my "home" is fleeting. I see images of family whose names I cannot recall and dream of emotions I no longer feel as vividly. On occasion, I sense nature as if she were my mother, as though never removed from her bosom, but such moments are few. I bear the hallmarks of senility with the rage and power of a young elf to lament it.

Bodhi endured the curse much better than I do now, but she was more focused and, more importantly, undead. She is now thoroughly seduced by her vampiric condition, despite its previous failure to counteract the death sentence she was under. She had embraced her mortality, excited by the urgency of it, but now she is confused. Imoen's soul has restored her, but her motives remain transparent, even simplistic. She revels in her carnal nature even as the elf within despises the creature she has become.

I would pity my "sister" if I were capable, but emotions come to me only in violent outbursts. Ellesime has taken my ability to truly feel, and I am left with the threadbare heart of a human, or some other short-lived vermin. I will not suffer this much longer.

Spellhold has met my needs quite well. They had made a practice of experimenting on inmates here for quite some time, though in a barbaric fashion. I refined their instruments and have finished preparing the necessary rituals. I am quite through with Imoen, though she can still serve as bait. I am certain <CHARNAME> will make an appearance sooner or later.

Bodhi has delivered more assassins than I had asked for. I disposed of some in advance, but it seems such a waste. I think she has done this on purpose, as she has taken to releasing the extras in the maze below and hunting at her leisure. I marvel at her hunger and how she seems so *alive* in her undeath. Perhaps it is the soul of Imoen. Soon I shall see for myself. <CHARNAME> had best hurry.《這些文字一定會成為令人難堪的記錄，但是我必須在此理清我的思緒，以免它們從我那受詛的心中消逝。

現在禁魔監獄已經在我的控制之下了。在我從休眠中醒來後，我簡單地瞭解了一下這裡有什麼防禦。協調者瓦尼夫對於某個心靈系的法術有著奇怪的反應，結果失去了自我意識。我忘了是那個法術；也許是我在索丹尼斯拉神殿裡聽到的吧……這件事重要嗎？

我的情況變得更糟了，我所記得的「家鄉」也只剩下零散的片段。我看到家人的影像，卻想不起他們的名字；我夢到我曾情緒激昂，可是實際上我已經無法真切地感受到這些東西了。偶爾我也能夠與自然有所聯繫，好像她是我的母親一樣，好像我從來不曾離開她的胸懷一樣，但是這種機會變得越來越少。我帶著年邁的標記，卻以年輕精靈的憤怒及力量來為它哀悼。

芭荻比我更能忍受咒詛之苦，但是她卻更專注、也更執著於永生。現在她完全被她的吸血鬼狀態所吸引，而根本不去理會這種狀態其實無法完全抵銷掉她所受的死刑。她已經接受了她的凡性，對無常感到興奮，因此她陷於迷惑之中。愛蒙的靈魂雖然喚醒了她，但是她的動機仍然很明白，或者說是過於單純。即使她內在的精靈天性並不喜歡自己變成怪物，但她依然沉迷於肉體的天性。

如果我可以的話，我會同情我的「姐妹」，但是情感只對我造成暴烈的衝擊。艾麗星已經拿走我真正感受的能力，而我只剩下殘破的人類之心，簡直像某種短命蟲似的。我絕不會再忍受這種事下去了。
